title: Kuma’s Life as a Buccaneer
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, York, Unknown person #14, Bonney, Kuma as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me for being so blunt, but your daughter has another 5 years, at best!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be a miracle if she reaches her 10th birthday...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid it's simply terminal, going by our current scientific understanding of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It'll be over by her 10th birthday...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't fair... she's already growing into such a strong woman. Is there really no cure?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Kerchak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WAA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: BONNEY?! I THOUGHT YOU WERE ASLEEP...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I heard it all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said it'll be over by my 10th Birthday, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOUR 10TH?! I HAVE NO IDEA WHAT YOU'RE TALKING ABOUT...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I heard you say it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey, are you crying?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Is it something I said?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... yes he said when you're 10... Uhh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was about your illness, Bonney. That stupid doctor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He told me that your condition is going to continue as it is till you're 10.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just such an appalling amount of time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't help but get down after that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that means I'll be all better when I'm 10, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So we can go on those trips_!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, Daddy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: @HNo, what have I done?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-Of course!! By the time you've turned 10, you'll be cured!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: YIPPE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What am I going to do...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A familiar nightmare would soon descend on the kingdom of sorbet, only one year later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You've got to save us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: King Becori has returned, and he's just as monstrous as ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's just like 16 years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: SCH! 1098 / end.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He still wants to gut loose the country's "deadweight!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's going to burn the people in their homes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHAT...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The never ending tragedy continues to unfold...

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
